title: PRIMARY CARE COMMUNITY CLINIC - 211info
text: BORLAND FREE CLINIC PRIMARY CARE COMMUNITY CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Providies a community clinic offering primary and some speciality care. Also offers gynecological services, mental health care, physical therapy, diabetes education classes, prescription medicine discounts, assistance in applying for OHP, referrals to outside providers, and information about other social services. 3550 SW Borland Road Tualatin, OR 97062 Eligibility: Individuals who are at or below 400% of the Federal Poverty Line (FPL) Hours: Monday/Thursday 3pm-7pm, Wednesday 9am-1pm Email (503) 974-8887 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 974-8887 Email Address: INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment. Walk-in services may be available but are not guaranteed. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Community Clinics Community Mental Health Agencies Diabetes Management Clinics Navigator Programs Obstetrics/Gynecology Physical Therapy Prescription Expense Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BORLAND FREE CLINIC
